demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse; usually independent, gets around with a guide dog

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I tripped over a chair that wasn't supposed to be there, tore my leg open, and now I am completely terrified to move.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I fell about an hour ago over furniture that had been moved, there's a deep cut on my shin that's bleeding, and I've had a panic attack and can't get myself up off the floor.

symptom_narrative.onset: about an hour ago, right after I tripped
symptom_narrative.duration: the cut and the panic have been going the whole hour
symptom_narrative.character: a long gaping cut on the front of my right shin that keeps oozing blood, and a horrible wave of panic — heart pounding, breathing fast, shaking
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the cut really hurts and the fear is the worst part — I feel completely terrified and frozen
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: front of my lower right leg, over the shin
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: my spouse holding a towel on it has slowed the bleeding a bit, and being talked to calmly helps the panic
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to move, and not knowing where anything is because the furniture was rearranged
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: racing heart and fast breathing that came on with the fright; I can still feel and move my foot
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm normally completely independent with my guide dog, but right now I'm stuck on the floor, too scared and sore to move

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've been completely blind since birth — no light perception at all
past_medical_history.how_managed: I manage independently with a guide dog and by memorising the layout of my home

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: my sleep has been all over the place lately and I've been really tired and less aware of my surroundings

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: a visiting relative rearranged the furniture in my home, so my usual mental map of the space is wrong; my guide dog is shut in another room right now; my spouse is here with me

access_barriers.other: profound spatial disorientation from the changed home layout; cannot visually self-monitor the wound

objective_data_offered.value: a long gaping cut across the front of the lower right shin, roughly the length of a finger, slowly oozing dark red blood; a folded towel is being pressed over it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described/held to camera by the spouse; wound depth and any deeper structure involvement cannot be judged remotely

objective_data_offered.value: spouse reports she is sitting on the floor trembling, sweaty and breathing fast, very frightened and refusing to move
she says her heart feels like it is racing and she is breathing quickly since the fright
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective sensation, no home device reading provided

objective_data_offered.value: the bleeding is a steady ooze, not spurting, and has slowed with firm pressure from the towel
